title: Your inner fish
author: Neil Shubin
publisher: tells a ""compelling scientific adventure story that will change forever how you understand what it means to be human"" (Oliver Sacks). By examining fossils and DNA
description: The paleontologist and professor of anatomy who co-discovered Tiktaalik, the "fish with hands
subjects: and major parts of our genomes look and function like those of worms and bacteria. Your Inner Fish makes us look at ourselves and our world in an illuminating new light. This is science writing at its finest--enlightening
notes: accessible and told with irresistible enthusiasm."
